description: Composition Green pullover made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed V-neckline with tape detailing on the inseam, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, and has ruggedly appliqued and printed brand detailing on the upper left chest Fitting Regular Wash care Hand wash in cold water with mild detergent Do not soak, wring or twist Dry in shade Fold and stack to maintain shape Moderate warm iron Do not iron on print or embroidery The appliqued and printed brand detailing on the upper left chest adds rugged styling to this pullover from spykar, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day. Team it with shirts or t-shirts, jeans and sneakers. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 19"
